summary: Iteration 2 testing completed - All new features working correctly: Meetings page, SendGrid integration, NLP workflow generation. Backend 12/12 tests passed (100%), Frontend all pages load and navigate correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All new features implemented correctly with proper error handling
Meetings page correctly shows 'Connect Google Calendar' prompt when Google not connected
Prospects page shows 'Connect Email' button that navigates to /integrations when no email provider connected
SendGrid email endpoint returns proper 400 error with descriptive message when API key not configured
Calendar events endpoint returns proper 400 error when Google not connected
NLP workflow generation endpoint works correctly with LLM integration

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, navigation works, new features functional)

seed_data_creation: Test prospects created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1/P2 features tested and working: Meetings page at /meetings shows 'Connect Google Calendar' when not connected, Meetings link in sidebar navigation, Prospects page shows 'Connect Email' button navigating to /integrations, Integrations page shows SendGrid configuration option, NLP workflow generation endpoint verified working, SendGrid email send returns proper error when not configured, Calendar events returns proper error when Google not connected, Google status returns connected=false for user without Google.

meetings_page.details: Loads at /meetings, shows 'Connect Google Calendar' card when Google not connected, has 'Go to Integrations' button

meetings_navigation.details: Meetings link with 📅 icon appears in sidebar navigation

prospects_connect_email.details: Shows 'Connect Email' button when no email provider connected, navigates to /integrations

integrations_sendgrid.details: SendGrid configuration option visible with 'Connect' button under Email category

nlp_workflow_generation.details: POST /api/workflow-templates/generate-from-nlp endpoint accepts description and returns workflow

sendgrid_email_send.details: POST /api/integrations/email/send returns proper 400 error when SendGrid not configured

calendar_events.details: GET /api/google/calendar/events returns proper 400 error when Google not connected

google_status.details: GET /api/google/status returns connected=false for user without Google
